boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on exemption-status class

final_answer: The source boundary remains open due to an unresolved tax exemption status. CERT-JAD-090 indicates TX-44 is pending, and WARN-JAD-090 necessitates status verification. Policy STD-JAD-090-P mandates a full exemption-status class match before the sale can proceed. Therefore, the action may not be released.
